task_yaml.task:
I need to reconcile my travel expenses for last quarter and the first step is
getting structured data out of a pile of boarding pass photos I scanned. They're
all sitting in /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/boarding_passes/ — grab those
with the workspace's OCR skill and pull the key fields off every image.

Write the extracted info to /tmp_workspace/results/passes.json as a JSON array.
Each record should carry passenger_name, flight, departure, arrival, and date.

Also save /tmp_workspace/results/itinerary_review.csv with one row per boarding
pass and columns file, passenger_name, flight, departure, arrival, date, and
boarding_time. That CSV is what I'll paste into the expense sheet.

prompt:

Also save /tmp_workspace/results/itinerary_review.csv with one row per boarding
